free_text: Determination of k0 and Q0-factors of short-lived
Transfer timer of the samples from irradiation
- Al-Au wire of 0.112 % Au, 0.020 inch diameter,Reactor
- Zr-foil of 99.8% Zr, 0.127 mm thickness, Johnson
-Al-Co wire of 0.504 % Co, 0.015 inch diameter, Reactor
-Zn foil of 99.95 % Zn, 0.025 mm thickness, Goodfellow,
- Sn foil of 100 % Sn, 0.04 mm thickness, MERCK,7826
were used as monitors to determine alpha-factor and
f-factor( ratio of thermal to epithermal fluxes).
diameter 47.7 mm, height 48.9 mm. Be-window of 0.5 mm.
Preamplifier - ORTE TRPA, amplifier - Gated Integrator
Mean value of f-factor was determined by "bare monitor"
method to be 19.2 and by "Cd-ratio" method to be 18.7.
